text: COMES NOW the plaintiff and respectfully moves this Court for summary judgment pursuant to Rule 56 of the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure.
label: motion

text: Defendant moves this Court to dismiss the complaint for failure to state a claim upon which relief can be granted under Rule 12(b)(6).
label: motion

text: Plaintiff files this emergency motion for a temporary restraining order to prevent irreparable harm pending a full hearing on the merits.
label: motion

text: The defendant hereby moves for a continuance of the trial date due to the unavailability of a key material witness.
label: motion

text: Plaintiff moves this Court to compel production of documents withheld by defendant without proper privilege designation.
label: motion

text: This motion in limine seeks to exclude expert testimony that does not satisfy the Daubert standard for scientific reliability.
label: motion

text: Movant respectfully requests that this Court grant partial summary judgment on the issue of liability, leaving only damages for trial.
label: motion

text: Defendant moves to strike the plaintiff's second amended complaint as untimely and prejudicial under Fed. R. Civ. P. 15.
label: motion

text: The People move to suppress evidence obtained during a warrantless search of defendant's vehicle in violation of the Fourth Amendment.
label: motion

text: Plaintiff's motion for a protective order seeks to limit the scope of depositions to relevant, non-privileged matters.
label: motion

text: Defendant moves for judgment as a matter of law at the close of plaintiff's case under Federal Rule 50(a).
label: motion

text: The intervenor moves to intervene as of right in this action pursuant to Federal Rule of Civil Procedure 24(a)(2).
label: motion

text: Plaintiff's motion to reconsider requests that this Court revisit its prior order in light of newly discovered controlling authority.
label: motion

text: Defendant moves for sanctions under Rule 11 on grounds that plaintiff's complaint is frivolous and filed for improper purposes.
label: motion

text: This motion for change of venue argues that the Southern District is a more convenient forum given the location of witnesses and evidence.
label: motion

text: This brief presents the argument that the lower court erred in its interpretation of the contract's material breach provision.
label: brief

text: Appellant's opening brief argues that the trial court's exclusion of critical evidence constitutes reversible error under de novo review.
label: brief

text: Appellee's brief in opposition demonstrates that the lower court's judgment should be affirmed in all respects.
label: brief

text: This amicus curiae brief is submitted on behalf of civil liberties organizations urging reversal of the search-and-seizure ruling.
label: brief

text: The reply brief addresses the appellee's mischaracterization of the controlling precedent in this Circuit.
label: brief

text: Petitioner's brief argues that the statute as applied violates the Equal Protection Clause of the Fourteenth Amendment.
label: brief

text: This brief in support of the motion for summary judgment establishes that no genuine dispute of material fact exists on any element.
label: brief

text: The government's brief argues that respondent waived his constitutional challenge by failing to raise it before the district court.
label: brief

text: Amicus brief submitted by the National Bar Association urging the Court to adopt a broader reading of the attorney-client privilege.
label: brief

text: This opening brief presents four independent grounds for reversal of the administrative agency's final order.
label: brief

text: Appellant's supplemental brief addresses the impact of the Supreme Court's recent decision on the issues presented in this appeal.
label: brief

text: The defendant's brief in opposition to class certification argues that individual issues predominate over common questions.
label: brief

text: This brief argues that federal preemption bars all state tort claims arising from the defendant's compliance with federal regulations.
label: brief

text: Respondent's brief demonstrates that the petitioner failed to exhaust administrative remedies before seeking judicial review.
label: brief

text: The interlocutory brief addresses this Court's jurisdiction to hear an appeal from a non-final order granting partial summary judgment.
label: brief

text: DEPOSITION OF JOHN DOE, taken pursuant to notice on March 3, 2024, at the offices of Smith & Jones LLP, New York, New York.
label: deposition

text: Q: Please state your name for the record. A: My name is Jane Smith. Q: And what is your current occupation? A: I am a certified public accountant.
label: deposition

text: The witness testified that she was present at the meeting on the date in question and observed the defendant sign the contract.
label: deposition

text: Q: Did you prepare this financial report? A: Yes. Q: When did you prepare it? A: In October of last year, before the merger closed.
label: deposition

text: EXAMINATION BY MR. JONES: Q: Mr. Williams, you were the CFO of the company during the period covered by this lawsuit, correct?
label: deposition

text: The deponent stated under oath that no written agreement existed between the parties prior to the oral contract formed in June.
label: deposition

text: Q: I'm handing you what's been marked Exhibit 5. Can you identify this document? A: Yes, that's the lease agreement I signed.
label: deposition

text: Cross-examination by defense counsel revealed that the witness had not reviewed the underlying data before certifying the report.
label: deposition

text: The deponent confirmed that she had sent the email marked Exhibit 12 and had received no response prior to filing the complaint.
label: deposition

text: Q: Were you aware of the safety hazard at the time of the incident? A: No, I was not informed of any hazard prior to that day.
label: deposition

text: Deposition of Dr. Robert Chen, M.D., expert witness retained by plaintiff, taken at plaintiff's counsel's offices in Chicago.
label: deposition

text: Q: Please describe your methodology for calculating the lost profits figure you included in your expert report.
label: deposition

text: The witness acknowledged on cross that he had made similar representations to investors in three prior transactions.
label: deposition

text: Q: Did you consult with legal counsel before signing the confidentiality agreement? A: No, I did not.
label: deposition

text: Continued deposition of Thomas Brown, resumed from January 15, 2024, with all counsel present and the witness still under oath.
label: deposition

text: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED that defendant's motion to dismiss is DENIED. Plaintiff has adequately pleaded all required elements.
label: order

text: THE COURT ORDERS that the parties shall complete fact discovery no later than sixty days from the date of this order.
label: order

text: IT IS SO ORDERED that the preliminary injunction is GRANTED. Defendant is enjoined from disclosing plaintiff's trade secrets.
label: order

text: Upon review of the motion and opposition, the Court hereby GRANTS partial summary judgment on the issue of breach of contract.
label: order

text: IT IS ORDERED AND ADJUDGED that final judgment is entered in favor of plaintiff in the amount of $2,450,000 plus pre-judgment interest.
label: order

text: The Court ORDERS the parties to submit a joint proposed scheduling order within fourteen days of this ruling.
label: order

text: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED that this matter is referred to Magistrate Judge Davis for all discovery disputes and pretrial matters.
label: order

text: The motion for class certification is GRANTED. The class is defined as all purchasers of the security during the class period.
label: order

text: IT IS ORDERED that defendant shall produce all documents responsive to Request Nos. 14 through 22 within ten days.
label: order

text: The Court DENIES the motion to exclude expert testimony. The expert's methodology satisfies the requirements of Federal Rule 702.
label: order

text: IT IS SO ORDERED that the trial scheduled for April 15, 2024 is CONTINUED to June 3, 2024 at 9:00 a.m.
label: order

text: The Court GRANTS the motion to transfer venue to the Northern District of California under 28 U.S.C. section 1404(a).
label: order

text: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED that sanctions are imposed on plaintiff's counsel in the amount of $5,000 payable to the court within 30 days.
label: order

text: The motion in limine is GRANTED IN PART and DENIED IN PART. Evidence of prior bad acts is excluded; character evidence is admitted.
label: order

text: IT IS ORDERED that the case is DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE pursuant to Rule 41(a)(1) upon joint stipulation of the parties.
label: order
